minecraft:lore: {"text": "📊 武器等级: ", "color": "white", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "Lv.6", "color": "#FFD700", "bold": true}]}

{"text":"☆ 暴击率: ","color":"white","italic":false,"extra":[{"text":"+5%","color":"gold","bold":true}]}
{"text":"⚡ 攻击速度: ","color":"white","italic":false,"extra":[{"text":"2.7/秒","color":"aqua","bold":true}]}

{"text":"⚒ 特殊技能: ","color":"white","italic":false,"extra":[{"text":"暗影收割","color":"#8B008B","bold":true},{"text":" (Shift+右键)","color":"gray","bold":false}]}
{"text": "💰 售价：", "color": "white", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "无法出售", "color": "red", "bold": true}]}
